address.address: National Fire Service College, Government of India
address.location: Palm Road, Civil Lines Oppo District Court

pos_sentences.text: Placements are very good, with all students getting palced
pos_sentences.name: ADARSH SURKAR

pos_sentences.text: Library facilities are awesome and books available are high in numbers
pos_sentences.name: ADARSH SURKAR

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure is good And the course is well planned
pos_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

pos_sentences.text: Placements stats are good and placement is 100%
pos_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

pos_sentences.text: NFSC is known for its Discipline and Decoram
pos_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

pos_sentences.text: You can enter in PSU's directly on the basis of your interview .
pos_sentences.name: Digvijay Maury

pos_sentences.text: Many Students directly get placed in PSUs (without GATE) on the basis of their interview.
pos_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

pos_sentences.text: One of the biggest fire laboratory in whole Asia.
pos_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

pos_sentences.text: Best college at low rank and provide almost 100% placement.
pos_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

pos_sentences.text: NFSC maintains strict discipline to ensure that students develop the physical, mental, and ethical qualities required for a career.
pos_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

neg_sentences.text: The schedule is lengthy and energy consuming
neg_sentences.name: ADARSH SURKAR

neg_sentences.text: If any complain is passed regarding anything it takes to much time to solve
neg_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

neg_sentences.text: Harsh routine since morning 6am to 6pm and in night' roll call of 1hrs
neg_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

neg_sentences.text: 1st year hostel toilets are not good,So many things are damaged
neg_sentences.name: Harsh Dhote

neg_sentences.text: Very less vacation even sometime semester vacation are not
neg_sentences.name: NIRDOSH KUMAR

neg_sentences.text: Sports facility is not good. very few sports facility in our college
neg_sentences.name: NIRDOSH KUMAR

neg_sentences.text: There are very less sports facility all of negligible
neg_sentences.name: Abhishek dube

neg_sentences.text: There are very few (almost negligible) sports facilities on campus.
neg_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

neg_sentences.text: Lengthy schedule which limits our extra curriculum activity.
neg_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar

neg_sentences.text: NFSC provides very less vacation even some times semester vacation are not there
neg_sentences.name: Sundaram Kumar
